description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed human figure standing upright on a rectangular plinth. The figure appears to be draped in classical-style garments, with detailed folds and a serene facial expression. The right arm is bent and held close to the body, while the left arm is partially obscured by the drapery. The base is solid and slightly stepped, providing stability and a sense of elevation. The surface of the sculpture is predominantly off-white with subtle weathering or patina, suggesting age or exposure. The overall form is slender and vertical, with fine detailing in the hair and clothing.
description: A classical-style robed human figure stands on a rectangular plinth, with detailed drapery and a serene expression. The sculpture is off-white with subtle weathering.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full frontal details of the robed figure, including facial features and the arrangement of the drapery.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure and the depth of the draped garment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figure and the flowing folds of the robe, as well as the back of the plinth.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile and the way the robe wraps around the body.
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.

license_info.creator_display_name: Harvard Museum of the Ancient Near East
